title: Thai Curry Noodle Soup
description: A spicy and aromatic Thai-inspired noodle soup made with curry paste and crunchy peanuts.
instructions: Cook rice noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a large pot, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium heat.
Add the onion and bell peppers and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the curry paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Pour in the chicken broth and coconut milk, and bring to a simmer.
Add the fish sauce and sugar, and stir to combine.
Add the cooked noodles, peanuts, and salt. Stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until heated through.
Serve hot, garnished with additional peanuts and herbs if desired.
